 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_LINE_OPL WSOLT
 WHERE DML_TYPE='I' 
 AND NOT EXISTS
 (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT
 WHERE 
 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND NSOLT.SS_CODE='OPL'
 )
